title: Natutec Scout App – Digital IPM management System
subtitle: Natutec Scout App - Gestion numérique de la lutte intégrée contre les parasites système
description: A guide for using the Natutec Scout App, a mobile platform that streamlines integrated pest management in greenhouse vegetable production. It enables automatic pest detection through smartphone-based scouting, provides real-time data analysis and customizable alert thresholds, and supports decision-making for improved crop health and yield.
